name: 7q22_SHFM1_SD
description: 7q21.3-q22.1 region containing the SHFM1 (split-hand/foot malformation type 1) critical interval with DLX5/DLX6 and DYNC1I1 limb enhancer. Flanked by SDs that mediate recurrent ~880 kb deletions disrupting long-range enhancers without affecting DLX5/6 coding sequence.

architecture.internal_structure: Two ~30-50 kb SD blocks flanking DYNC1I1 exon 15/17 limb enhancers and DLX5/DLX6 cluster; NAHR substrate for SHFM1 deletions.
